chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-209 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 24-10-2024 Mr. Asghar Hussain Shar, Advocate for petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG waive notice. **** Learned AAG and DPG appeared and waived notice of this petition and submit that of official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law. In view of such statements, counsel for petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioners and to act strictly in accordance with law. Let a copy of this order be sent to SSP, Naushahro Feroze by FAX for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
